div.div:
Normalise to SPDX
Exact: Apache 2 → Apache-2.0
Fuzzy: MIT License → MIT
Ambiguous (BSD, GPLv3)
→ NEEDS-HUMAN-REVIEW

div.div:
Rule A: Proprietary
Check Vendor Agreements
(NVIDIA, Intel, IBM Spyre)
RH/IBM → ESCALATE
Third-party → ESCALATE

NEEDS-HUMAN-
REVIEW
No license file found
Ambiguous SPDX mapping
SPDX not in Fedora data
Unrecognised status value

div.div:
Structured Verdict
License: SPDX expression
Source verified: YES / NO
Verdict: ALLOWED / CAVEAT /
REVIEW / ESCALATE / BLOCKED
Build compliance: OK / FLAG
Export compliance: OK / FLAG
Notes: actionable guidance
